# graphics

> Source-linked Python and native C reference for the PyDevices graphics module.

## API Reference

- [graphics API reference](/graphics/api/generated/introduction.html): Source-linked Python and native C reference for the PyDevices graphics module.
- [Area and clipping](/graphics/api/generated/area-clipping.html): Rectangle geometry, scoped clip contexts, and clipped canvas operations.
- [FrameBuffer](/graphics/api/generated/framebuffer.html): Native framebuffer construction, drawing, text, blitting, scrolling, and file output.
- [Drawing operations](/graphics/api/generated/drawing.html): Object-oriented and module-level shape, text, polygon, and blit operations.
- [Fonts and images](/graphics/api/generated/fonts-images.html): Bitmap font rendering, RGB565 bitmap access, and image conversion helpers.
- [Runtime and pixel formats](/graphics/api/generated/module-formats.html): Runtime capability probes and the exported framebuffer format constants.
- [Native drawing and framebuffer API](/graphics/api/generated/native-drawing.html): Public C declarations for geometry, framebuffer operations, shapes, and clipping.
- [Native fonts, images, and runtime API](/graphics/api/generated/native-assets-runtime.html): Public C declarations for fonts, BMP565 data, image conversion, and capability reporting.
